pull.title: BIP340 updates: clarifications, variable-length messages, expand domain separation
pull.body: For clarification, this does not make any semantics changes apart from permitting messages to have another length than 32. BIP341 and BIP342 obviously keep making use of just the 32-byte ones, and are thus unaffected.

events.message: bip340: clarify that tags are byte arrays
bip340: Add subsection on Domain Separation

rename.from: BIP340 updates: clairifications, variable-length messages, expand domain separation
rename.to: BIP340 updates: clarifications, variable-length messages, expand domain separation

events.body: Is there anything to do on our side that prevents this from being merged?
